title: Alberta education cut expected to lay off thousands during pandemic
author: Jordan Omstead
notes: DISTINCT from Budget 2020 (Feb 27): This is a COVID-specific redirection of $128M from school boards to COVID response, announced Mar 28 2020. Education Ministry directed school boards to immediately issue notices to EAs, support staff, bus drivers. CUPE estimated ~20,000 temporary layoffs; ATA said ~25,000 including substitute teachers. Funding described as 'temporary' — to be restored on return. Relates to EVT-054 (Budget 2020) as a separate but related event.
